sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_index_hint (id UInt32, FlightDate Date) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
UPDATE test_index_hint SET FlightDate = '2017-09-17' WHERE indexHint(id = 1);
SELECT FlightDate AS k, count() FROM test_index_hint GROUP BY k ORDER BY k;
SELECT FlightDate AS k, count() FROM test_index_hint WHERE indexHint(k = '2017-09-16') GROUP BY k ORDER BY k DESC;
